# Keepra

> Keepra is a private, offline-first productivity app for Web, Windows, and Android.
> It combines six tools in one window: Links, Vault (encrypted credentials), Notes, Tasks, Contacts, and Drive.
> All data is AES-256-GCM encrypted and stored locally. Cloud sync is zero-knowledge.

## App

- [Keepra Web App](https://keepra.tech/app.html): The live app. Works in any browser. PWA-installable for offline use.
- [Downloads](https://github.com/mudassir-awan/keepra/releases/latest): Windows Electron installer (.exe) and Android APK, hosted on GitHub Releases.

## Documentation

- [Installation Guide](docs/INSTALL.md): How to install Keepra on Web, Windows, and Android.
- [MCP Integration Guide](docs/MCP-SETUP.md): How to connect Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible client to Keepra via MCP.
- [Changelog](docs/CHANGELOG.md): What changed in each version.
- [Roadmap](docs/ROADMAP.md): Planned features and current status.
- [Security Policy](SECURITY.md): Encryption model and vulnerability disclosure.

## Key Facts

- **What Keepra does**: Manages links/bookmarks, passwords/credentials, Markdown notes, to-do tasks, contacts, and files in a single encrypted app.
- **Encryption**: AES-256-GCM with PBKDF2 (600,000 iterations, SHA-256). Zero-knowledge: the server never sees plaintext.
- **Platforms**: Web (PWA), Windows 10+ (Electron), Android 8+ (APK). iOS/macOS planned.
- **Pricing**: Free during public beta (2026). Paid plans (Free / Pro / Lifetime) launching around Q4 2026.
- **MCP**: Keepra ships an MCP server (keepra-mcp.js) for AI client integration. Works with any MCP-compatible assistant — Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, and Windsurf — using scoped, device-local, revocable keys.
- **Sync**: Cross-device sync via a single Secret Key. Same key on any device means same Firebase account means same decrypted data. No email or password required.
- **Open source**: No. Proprietary. This GitHub repository is the public community hub (issues, docs, downloads).
- **Contact**: keepra.tech - support@keepra.tech
